news.t: New York Life Investments Expands Active ETF Lineup With Launch of NYLI MacKay Muni Allocation ETF (MMMA)

overview.description: The NYLI MacKay Muni Allocation ETF (MMMA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests broadly in municipal bonds that are exempt from regular federal income tax. The fund invests in both investment grade and high-yield bonds with maturities of 5 years or longer. MMMA was launched on Dec 16, 2025 and is issued by New York Life Investments.

data.title: New York Life Investments Expands Active ETF Lineup With Launch of NYLI MacKay Muni Allocation ETF (MMMA)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--New York Life Investments today announced the launch of the NYLI MacKay Muni Allocation ETF (NYSE: MMMA), an actively-managed municipal bond ETF designed to deliver attracti...
